title: selaginella eatonii
intro: Selaginella eatonii, also known as Spike Moss, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginella genus of the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Selaginella eatonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Selaginella eatonii is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
